info.name: Microsoft Azure Personalizer Client 2022-09-01-preview
info.description: Personalizer Service is an Azure Cognitive Service that makes it easy to target content and experiences without complex pre-analysis or cleanup of past data. Given a context and featurized content, the Personalizer Service returns which content item to show to users in rewardActionId. As rewards are sent in response to the use of rewardActionId, the reinforcement learning algorithm will improve the model and improve performance of future rank calls.

request.description: Get the Personalizer service configuration.

response.name: Success
response.body:
{
  "defaultReward": "<float>",
  "explorationPercentage": "<float>",
  "logRetentionDays": "<integer>",
  "modelExportFrequency": "<string>",
  "modelRetrainDays": 0,
  "rewardAggregation": "<string>",
  "rewardWaitTime": "<string>",
  "logMirrorEnabled": "<boolean>",
  "logMirrorSasUri": "<string>",
  "lastConfigurationEditDate": "<dateTime>",
  "learningMode": "Apprentice",
  "isAutoOptimizationEnabled": "<boolean>",
  "autoOptimizationFrequency": "<string>",
  "autoOptimizationStartDate": "<dateTime>"
}

response.name: A generic error has occurred on the server.

description.content: Error code for specific error that occurred.

query.description: "Time interval for aggregation of events in minutes. Allowed intervals: 5 minutes, 60 minutes, 360 minutes, 720 minutes and 1440 minutes. Defaults to 5 minutes.
Rolling or Expanding time. Rolling compatible with 60 minutes, 360 minutes, 720 minutes and 1440 minutes intervals. Expanding compatible with 5 minute time interval only. Defaults to Expanding.

query.description:
An expression to filter the evaluations against evaluation metadata. Only evaluations where the expression evaluates to true are included in the response.
Here is an example, metadata=evaluationType eq 'Manual'.
The maximum number of resources to return from the collection. Defaults to maximum value of integer.
An offset into the collection of the first resource to be returned. Defaults to 0.
The maximum number of resources to include in a single response. Defaults to 100.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Multi Slot Rank

request.description: Submit a Personalizer multi-slot rank request. Receives a context, a list of actions, and a list of slots. Returns which of the provided actions should be used in each slot, in each rewardActionId.

response.name: Created
Invalid request.
